drift_classes.missing_artifact: A required committed generated or generated-like artifact path is absent.
drift_classes.stale_generated_output: An owning check command reports that committed output no longer matches current source inputs.
drift_classes.generator_missing: A declared generator command points at a missing repo-local generator script.
drift_classes.check_command_missing: A required check command cannot be resolved to a repo-local script or unittest lane.
drift_classes.volatile_field_uncontrolled: A committed artifact includes known volatile values without a documented normalization or volatility policy.
drift_classes.untracked_generated_output: A generated output group creates committed artifacts that are not listed in the inventory.
drift_classes.orphan_generated_output: A committed generated-like artifact is listed without an owner, source inputs, or check command.

allowed_skips.policy: Artifacts marked optional or future may be reported as skipped rather than failed when paths are absent.
Optional toolchains may be reported as unavailable when they are not required for the Python/std-lib validation lane.

unavailable_tool_policy: Required Python stdlib scripts and unittest lanes are failures when unavailable. Optional non-Python tools may be reported as unavailable and must not be hidden.
cargo_unavailable_policy: Cargo is optional for this guard. Cargo absence must not fail generated artifact drift checks unless a future artifact group explicitly marks Cargo as required.
no_network_policy: Drift checks must be deterministic, repo-local, and must not call external web APIs, fetch URLs, scrape, crawl, run live probes, deploy, or open persistent network services.
default_mode_policy: Default mode verifies committed artifacts and runs check commands. It does not run update commands or mutate artifacts.
strict_mode_policy: Strict mode additionally fails optional/future missing artifacts and command resolution gaps that default mode may report as skipped or unavailable.
notes: Generated Artifact Drift Guard v0 is validation/audit only.
Existing generators remain the source of truth for their own outputs.
Repository Shape Consolidation v0 makes static_site_dist the generated static deployment artifact group for site/dist.
Public Search Static Handoff v0 keeps search handoff outputs under static_site_dist and validates them without network calls or hosted backend claims.
Known volatile values must be normalized by the owning generator or documented in the artifact group.
